steps.title: Substitute the shared expression
steps.content:
Both equations equal $y$, so set the right sides equal:
$$x+33=(x+33)^2$$
Let $u=x+33$, giving:
$$u=u^2$$

steps.title: Solve for possible inputs
steps.content:
Move all terms to one side and factor:
$$u^2-u=0$$
$$u(u-1)=0$$
So $u=0$ or $u=1$, which means $x=-33$ or $x=-32$.

steps.title: Choose the listed value
steps.content: Only $-32$ appears among the choices. The answer is A.
